arcs.title: The Duck Bandit
arcs.summary: The Chocolate Frog offering vanished overnight. A seventh duck appeared, wearing a travelling cloak and carrying a tiny hand-drawn map showing what may be a trail route in the Gorge, stamped with a small gold duck silhouette. Steve cannot explain it. Christine has left another Frog. The Bandit appears to be communicating — possibly issuing an invitation.

arcs.title: The Briefcase Mystery
arcs.summary: The briefcase is now humming audibly in middle D. The Level Six vending machine has begun dispensing unsolicited items including a small card reading 'you'll want this later.' Two Aurors have requested guidance; Ministry returned their memo stamped 'not our department.' Briefcase remains unopened, contents unknown, glow still warm gold.
